p:cNvPr.name: Picture 2
p:cNvPr.descr: DalFort Capital Partners ("DFCP") Announces Sale of United Enertech, to Soler & Palau Ventilation, Inc. ("S&P")

a:r.a:t: Manufacturer of duct sealants, adhesives, and fire-stopping materials
Manufacturer and formulator of solvent- and water-based adhesives
Manufacturer and formulator of two-part epoxy systems
Manufacturer of doors, dock seals, dock shelters, curtains, and screens
Manufacturer of loading dock seals and shelters
Formulator and value-added distributor of specialty chemicals
Manufacturer and distributor of lubrication equipment and systems
Manufacturer of water, urethane, and epoxy-based adhesives and sealants
Manufacturer of proprietary industrial lubricants and greases
Manufacturer of specialty chemicals, adhesives, and coatings
Manufacturer of custom, water-based coatings and adhesives
Manufacturer of custom engineered adhesives and sealants
Manufacturer of mechanical air movement and control products
Manufacturer of architectural louvers, brake metal, sunshades, and grilles
Manufacturer of air, sound, and evaporative cooling control products
Manufacturer of ultraviolet germicidal irradiation (UVGI) products
Manufacturer of shutters, dampers, louvers, and air movement equipment
Manufacturer of protective coatings, linings, joint fillers, and materials
Manufacturer of cementitious coatings, linings, primers, and sealers
Manufacturer and distributor of resinous floor and wall coatings
Manufacturer of spray-applied elastomers, foams and equipment
